id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

tool_id.description: ToolBinding identifier for the tool that produced this result.

tool_name.description: Human-readable tool name captured with the result.

tool_type.description: Portable tool type captured with the result.

actor_id.description: Optional actor identifier associated with this operation or projection.

scope.description: Portable scope labels that constrain where the record applies.

input.description: Tool input captured as evidence metadata; sensitive values must be protected references.

output.description: Tool output captured as evidence metadata; sensitive values must be redacted or externalized.

evidence_ref.description: EvidenceRef identifier created for this tool result.

executed.description: Whether the tool was actually executed when the result was captured.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this record in the portable OACS model.
